hindu.tithi.1.brief: First day of the bright fortnight -- new beginnings
hindu.tithi.1.name: Shukla Pratipada
hindu.tithi.10.name: Shukla Dashami
hindu.tithi.11.brief: Day of spiritual Disziplin -- Ekadashi fast
hindu.tithi.11.name: Shukla Ekadashi
hindu.tithi.12.name: Shukla Dvadashi
hindu.tithi.13.name: Shukla Trayodashi
hindu.tithi.14.brief: Day before fullness -- tension and preparation
hindu.tithi.14.name: Shukla Chaturdashi
hindu.tithi.15.name: Purnima
hindu.tithi.16.brief: First day of waning -- the turn inward begins
hindu.tithi.16.name: Krishna Pratipada
hindu.tithi.17.name: Krishna Dvitiya
hindu.tithi.18.name: Krishna Tritiya
hindu.tithi.19.name: Krishna Chaturthi
hindu.tithi.2.name: Shukla Dvitiya
hindu.tithi.20.name: Krishna Panchami
hindu.tithi.21.name: Krishna Shashthi
hindu.tithi.22.name: Krishna Saptami
hindu.tithi.23.name: Krishna Ashtami
hindu.tithi.24.name: Krishna Navami
hindu.tithi.25.name: Krishna Dashami
hindu.tithi.26.brief: Day of spiritual Disziplin -- Ekadashi fast
hindu.tithi.26.name: Krishna Ekadashi
hindu.tithi.27.name: Krishna Dvadashi
hindu.tithi.28.name: Krishna Trayodashi
hindu.tithi.29.name: Krishna Chaturdashi
hindu.tithi.3.brief: Akshaya Tritiya -- prosperity that never diminishes
hindu.tithi.3.name: Shukla Tritiya
hindu.tithi.30.brief: New Moon -- the still point before rebirth
hindu.tithi.30.name: Amavasya
hindu.tithi.4.brief: Day of obstacles and their removal
hindu.tithi.4.name: Shukla Chaturthi
hindu.tithi.5.name: Shukla Panchami
hindu.tithi.6.brief: Day of divine youth and energy
hindu.tithi.6.name: Shukla Shashthi
hindu.tithi.7.name: Shukla Saptami
hindu.tithi.8.brief: Day of Verwandlung -- neither good nor ill
hindu.tithi.8.name: Shukla Ashtami
hindu.tithi.9.name: Shukla Navami
iching.hex.1.image: Himmel upon Himmel — der Weise strengthens himself ceaselessly
iching.hex.1.judgment: Pure creative force initiates all things
iching.hex.1.name: Das Schöpferische
iching.hex.10.image: Himmel above the See — der Weise distinguishes high and low
iching.hex.10.judgment: Treading upon the tiger's tail with care and propriety bringt Erfolg
iching.hex.10.name: Das Auftreten
iching.hex.11.image: Erde above Himmel — der Herrscher channels the way of Himmel for the people
iching.hex.11.judgment: Himmel and Erde unite — the small departs, the great approaches
iching.hex.11.name: Der Friede
iching.hex.12.image: Himmel above Erde — der Weise withdraws into inner worth
iching.hex.12.judgment: Himmel and Erde do not communicate — decline and obstruction
iching.hex.12.name: Die Stockung
iching.hex.13.image: Himmel with Feuer — der Weise organizes clans and distinguishes things
iching.hex.13.judgment: True fellowship among people durch shared principles
iching.hex.13.name: Gemeinschaft mit Menschen
iching.hex.14.image: Feuer above Himmel — der Weise curbs evil and promotes good
iching.hex.14.judgment: Feuer in Himmel — höchster Erfolg durch understanding what is great
iching.hex.14.name: Der Besitz des Großen
iching.hex.15.image: Berg within Erde — der Weise reduces what is too much and increases what is too little
iching.hex.15.judgment: Modesty creates success — the Berg within the Erde
iching.hex.15.name: Die Bescheidenheit
iching.hex.16.image: Donner over Erde — die alten Könige made music to honor merit
iching.hex.16.judgment: Donner over Erde — enthusiasm moves all things
iching.hex.16.name: Die Begeisterung
iching.hex.17.image: Donner within the See — der Weise rests at nightfall
iching.hex.17.judgment: Adapting to the time and following with sincerity bringt Erfolg
iching.hex.17.name: Die Nachfolge
iching.hex.18.image: Wind at the foot of the Berg — der Weise stirs up the people and nourishes virtue
iching.hex.18.judgment: What has been corrupted durch neglect can be restored durch effort
iching.hex.18.name: Die Arbeit am Verdorbenen
iching.hex.19.image: Erde above the See — der Weise teaches and shelters without limit
iching.hex.19.judgment: The great approaches with willing condescension toward the small
iching.hex.19.name: Die Annäherung
iching.hex.2.image: Erde upon Erde — der Weise supports all beings with broad virtue
iching.hex.2.judgment: Pure receptive force nourishes all things
iching.hex.2.name: Das Empfangende
iching.hex.20.image: Wind over Erde — die alten Könige visited the regions to teach the people
iching.hex.20.judgment: der Weise gazes upon the divine meaning beneath appearances
iching.hex.20.name: Die Betrachtung
iching.hex.21.image: Donner and lightning — die alten Könige enforced the laws with clarity
iching.hex.21.judgment: Energetic biting durch obstacles restores unity
iching.hex.21.name: Das Durchbeißen
iching.hex.22.image: Feuer at the foot of the Berg — der Weise brightens governance without daring to judge
iching.hex.22.judgment: Schönheit adorns form but substance must remain within
iching.hex.22.name: Die Anmut
iching.hex.23.image: Berg resting on the Erde — der Herrscher strengthens the foundation of the people
iching.hex.23.judgment: The dark forces peel away what has been built — accept and wait
iching.hex.23.name: Die Zersplitterung
iching.hex.24.image: Donner within the Erde — die alten Könige closed the passes at solstice
iching.hex.24.judgment: After decay, the turning point — the one Licht returns below
iching.hex.24.name: Die Wiederkehr
iching.hex.25.image: Donner under Himmel — die alten Könige nourished all beings in accord with the season
iching.hex.25.judgment: Acting from genuine nature without ulterior motive bringt Erfolg
iching.hex.25.name: Die Unschuld
iching.hex.26.image: Himmel within the Berg — der Weise studies the ancients to cultivate character
iching.hex.26.judgment: Firm restraint of great creative Kraft builds reserves of Stärke
iching.hex.26.name: Des Großen Zähmungskraft
iching.hex.27.image: Donner at the foot of the Berg — der Weise is careful with words and temperate in eating
iching.hex.27.judgment: Attending to what nourishes body and mind brings Glück
iching.hex.27.name: Die Ernährung
iching.hex.28.image: The See rises above the trees — der Weise stands alone without fear
iching.hex.28.judgment: The ridgepole bends — extraordinary measures are needed in extraordinary times
iching.hex.28.name: Des Großen Übergewicht
iching.hex.29.image: Wasser flows on and reaches the goal — der Weise teaches durch repeated practice
iching.hex.29.judgment: Repeated danger teaches sincerity of heart — flow like Wasser
iching.hex.29.name: Das Abgründige
iching.hex.3.image: Donner and rain — der Weise brings order from chaos
iching.hex.3.judgment: Birth pangs of new endeavors require perseverance
iching.hex.3.name: Die Anfangsschwierigkeit
iching.hex.30.image: Feuer doubled produces great brightness — der Weise illuminates all regions
iching.hex.30.judgment: Luminous clarity depends on something to cling to — accept dependence
iching.hex.30.name: Das Haftende
iching.hex.31.image: The See upon the Berg — der Weise receives others with openness
iching.hex.31.judgment: Mutual attraction between the yielding and the firm brings union
iching.hex.31.name: Die Einwirkung
iching.hex.32.image: Donner and Wind reinforce each other — der Weise stands firm in his direction
iching.hex.32.judgment: Enduring consistency in one's way of Leben bringt Erfolg
iching.hex.32.name: Die Dauer
iching.hex.33.image: Berg under Himmel — der Weise keeps the inferior at a distance with dignity
iching.hex.33.judgment: Strategic withdrawal before the advancing dark preserves Stärke
iching.hex.33.name: Der Rückzug
iching.hex.34.image: Donner above Himmel — der Weise treads no path contrary to propriety
iching.hex.34.judgment: Great Kraft combined with righteousness moves Himmel and Erde
iching.hex.34.name: Des Großen Macht
iching.hex.35.image: The sun rises over the Erde — der Weise brightens his bright virtue
iching.hex.35.judgment: The bright sun rises over the Erde — willing service brings rapid advance
iching.hex.35.name: Der Fortschritt
iching.hex.36.image: The sun sinks into the Erde — der Weise veils his brightness in dealings with the multitude
iching.hex.36.judgment: In times of Dunkelheit der Weise conceals his Licht to endure adversity
iching.hex.36.name: Die Verfinsterung des Lichts
iching.hex.37.image: Wind comes from Feuer — der Weise speaks with substance and acts with consistency
iching.hex.37.judgment: The well-ordered family is the foundation of all social order
iching.hex.37.name: Die Familie
iching.hex.38.image: Feuer above the See — der Weise remains individual within community
iching.hex.38.judgment: Despite outward opposition, underlying affinity makes small things possible
iching.hex.38.name: Der Gegensatz
iching.hex.39.image: Wasser on the Berg — der Weise turns attention to self-improvement
iching.hex.39.judgment: Facing an abyss before and a Berg behind — turn inward and gather allies
iching.hex.39.name: Das Hemmnis
iching.hex.4.image: Spring at the foot of the Berg — der Weise cultivates character
iching.hex.4.judgment: The young fool seeks the teacher, not the teacher the fool
iching.hex.4.name: Die Jugendtorheit
iching.hex.40.image: Donner and rain arise — der Weise pardons errors and forgives transgressions
iching.hex.40.judgment: When release from tension comes, return to normalcy swiftly
iching.hex.40.name: Die Befreiung
iching.hex.41.image: The See at the foot of the Berg — der Weise controls anger and restrains instincts
iching.hex.41.judgment: Decrease of the lower enriches the higher — sincerity in simplicity brings blessings
iching.hex.41.name: Die Minderung
iching.hex.42.image: Wind and Donner strengthen each other — der Weise moves toward good and corrects faults
iching.hex.42.judgment: der Herrscher decreases self to increase the people — generous Opfer brings benefit
iching.hex.42.name: Die Mehrung
iching.hex.43.image: The See rises to Himmel — der Weise distributes blessings to those below
iching.hex.43.judgment: Resolute action brings dark matters to Licht — proclaim the danger openly
iching.hex.43.name: Der Durchbruch
iching.hex.44.image: Wind under Himmel — der Herrscher proclaims his commands to the four quarters
iching.hex.44.judgment: The dark principle advances from below — recognize and contain it early
iching.hex.44.name: Das Entgegenkommen
iching.hex.45.image: The See over the Erde — der Weise renews his weapons to meet the unforeseen
iching.hex.45.judgment: People gather around a strong leader — prepare for the unexpected
iching.hex.45.name: Die Sammlung
iching.hex.46.image: Within the Erde wood grows — der Weise builds great things from small beginnings
iching.hex.46.judgment: Gentle effort directed steadily upward meets with höchster Erfolg
iching.hex.46.name: Das Empordringen
iching.hex.47.image: The See has no Wasser — der Weise risks his Leben to fulfill his purpose
iching.hex.47.judgment: Exhaustion of resources tests character — der Weise stakes his Leben on following his will
iching.hex.47.name: Die Bedrängnis
iching.hex.48.image: Wasser over wood — der Weise encourages the people and counsels mutual aid
iching.hex.48.judgment: The well nourishes all without being exhausted — seek the unchanging source
iching.hex.48.name: Der Brunnen
iching.hex.49.image: Feuer in the See — der Weise orders the calendar and clarifies the seasons
iching.hex.49.judgment: When the time is ripe, revolutionary change commands belief
iching.hex.49.name: Die Umwälzung
iching.hex.5.image: Clouds rise to Himmel — der Weise eats, drinks, and is joyful
iching.hex.5.judgment: Sincerity and Geduld lead to crossing the great Wasser
iching.hex.5.name: Das Warten
iching.hex.50.image: Feuer over wood — der Weise consolidates destiny by making his position correct
iching.hex.50.judgment: The sacred vessel transforms raw material into nourishment for the wise
iching.hex.50.name: Der Tiegel
iching.hex.51.image: Repeated Donner — der Weise sets things in order durch fearful reflection
iching.hex.51.judgment: Shock and Donner bring fear, then laughter — der Weise examines himself durch awe
iching.hex.51.name: Das Erregende
iching.hex.52.image: Mountains joined together — der Weise does not permit thoughts to go beyond the situation
iching.hex.52.judgment: Stillness of the Berg — der Weise quiets the mind and does not go beyond his position
iching.hex.52.name: Das Stillehalten
iching.hex.53.image: A tree on the Berg grows slowly — der Weise abides in dignity and virtue
iching.hex.53.judgment: Gradual development like a tree on the Berg brings lasting results
iching.hex.53.name: Die Entwicklung
iching.hex.54.image: Donner over the See — der Weise understands the transitory in Licht of eternity
iching.hex.54.judgment: The younger sister follows the elder — knowing one's place brings eventual good
iching.hex.54.name: Das Heiratende Mädchen
iching.hex.55.image: Donner and lightning together — der Weise decides lawsuits and carries out punishments
iching.hex.55.judgment: Fullness and Überfluss at the zenith — act now for the sun must set
iching.hex.55.name: Die Fülle
iching.hex.56.image: Feuer on the Berg — der Weise is clear and cautious in applying penalties
iching.hex.56.judgment: The traveler succeeds durch smallness and adaptability, not grandeur
iching.hex.56.name: Der Wanderer
iching.hex.57.image: Winds following one another — der Weise spreads his commands and carries out his affairs
iching.hex.57.judgment: Persistent gentle penetration achieves what aggression cannot
iching.hex.57.name: Das Sanfte
iching.hex.58.image: Lakes joined together — der Weise joins with friends for discussion and practice
iching.hex.58.judgment: True joy comes from inner firmness expressed with outward gentleness
iching.hex.58.name: Das Heitere
iching.hex.59.image: Wind drives over the Wasser — die alten Könige made offerings and built temples
iching.hex.59.judgment: Wind over Wasser disperses rigid separations — use gentle means to dissolve barriers
iching.hex.59.name: Die Auflösung
iching.hex.6.image: Himmel and Wasser move apart — der Weise plans before acting
iching.hex.6.judgment: Inner Wahrheit and caution resolve disagreement
iching.hex.6.name: Der Streit
iching.hex.60.image: Wasser over the See — der Weise creates number and measure to examine virtue and conduct
iching.hex.60.judgment: Proper limits bring structure — but bitter limitations should not be held to
iching.hex.60.name: Die Beschränkung
iching.hex.61.image: Wind over the See — der Weise deliberates upon punishments and delays execution
iching.hex.61.judgment: Inner Wahrheit reaches even pigs and fish — sincerity moves all beings
iching.hex.61.name: Innere Wahrheit
iching.hex.62.image: Donner on the Berg — der Weise is reverent in conduct and sorrowful in mourning
iching.hex.62.judgment: In small matters excess is permissible — the flying bird leaves its song behind
iching.hex.62.name: Des Kleinen Übergewicht
iching.hex.63.image: Wasser over Feuer — der Weise reflects on misfortune and prepares against it
iching.hex.63.judgment: All lines in their proper place — success, but vigilance against disorder
iching.hex.63.name: Nach der Vollendung
iching.hex.64.image: Feuer over Wasser — der Weise carefully distinguishes things and puts them in their places
iching.hex.64.judgment: The final crossing is not yet accomplished — careful discernment of forces is needed
iching.hex.64.name: Vor der Vollendung
iching.hex.7.image: Wasser within the Erde — der Weise nurtures the people and gathers Stärke
iching.hex.7.judgment: Disziplin and just leadership organize the people
iching.hex.7.name: Das Heer
iching.hex.8.image: Wasser upon the Erde — die alten Könige established their states
iching.hex.8.judgment: Union requires a central figure of sincerity
iching.hex.8.name: Das Zusammenhalten
iching.hex.9.image: Wind over Himmel — der Weise refines outward form and virtue
iching.hex.9.judgment: Gentle restraint achieves what force cannot
iching.hex.9.name: Des Kleinen Zähmungskraft
iching.tpl.detail: %1$s: %2$s. Das Bild: %3$s. Schlüsselworte: %4$s. Oberes Trigramm: %5$s, Unteres: %6$s.
islamic.month.1.brief: Sacred month of mourning and remembrance
islamic.month.1.name: Muharram
islamic.month.10.brief: Month of celebration and voluntary fasting
islamic.month.10.event: Eid al-Fitr (1st) -- Festival of Breaking Fast
islamic.month.10.name: Shawwal
islamic.month.11.brief: Sacred month of truce and preparation for Hajj
islamic.month.11.name: Dhul Qa'dah
islamic.month.12.brief: Sacred month of pilgrimage and Opfer
islamic.month.12.event: Hajj (8th-12th), Eid al-Adha (10th) -- Festival of Opfer
islamic.month.12.name: Dhul Hijjah
islamic.month.2.brief: Month of travel -- traditionally considered difficult
islamic.month.2.name: Safar
islamic.month.3.brief: Month of joy and prophetic celebration
islamic.month.3.name: Rabi al-Awwal
islamic.month.4.brief: Quiet month of reflection and growth
islamic.month.4.name: Rabi al-Thani
islamic.month.5.name: Jumada al-Ula
islamic.month.6.name: Jumada al-Thani
islamic.month.7.name: Rajab
islamic.month.8.name: Sha'ban
islamic.month.9.brief: Month of fasting, Offenbarung, and spiritual Erneuerung
islamic.month.9.name: Ramadan
islamic.prayer.0.meaning: Awakening -- beginning before the world stirs
islamic.prayer.0.name: Fajr
islamic.prayer.1.meaning: Remembrance -- pausing at the day's peak
islamic.prayer.1.name: Dhuhr
islamic.prayer.2.name: Asr
islamic.prayer.3.name: Maghrib
islamic.prayer.4.name: Isha
islamic.tpl.detail_sacred: Dies ist einer der vier heiligen Monate.
japanese.era.0.brief: The era of enlightened rule — Japan emerged from isolation into the modern age
japanese.era.0.name: Meiji
japanese.era.0.spirit: Rapid modernization, opening to the world, imperial restoration
japanese.era.1.brief: The era of great righteousness — a short season of democracy and artistic freedom
japanese.era.1.name: Taisho
japanese.era.1.spirit: Democratic movement, cultural liberalism, the brief flowering
japanese.era.2.brief: The era of radiant peace — from devastation to the world's second economy
japanese.era.2.name: Showa
japanese.era.2.spirit: War, defeat, rebirth, economic miracle, longest reign
japanese.era.3.brief: The era of achieving peace — prosperity tempered by earthquakes and introspection
japanese.era.3.name: Heisei
japanese.era.3.spirit: The lost decades, natural disasters, quiet resilience
japanese.era.4.brief: The era of beautiful Harmonie — named from the oldest Japanese poetry anthology
japanese.era.4.name: Reiwa
japanese.era.4.spirit: New era, connection to Man'yoshu poetry, hope and Harmonie
japanese.rokuyo.0.brief: Win first — seize the morning, the early hours favor bold action
japanese.rokuyo.0.guidance: Morning is auspicious, afternoon unlucky — act early, avoid delay
japanese.rokuyo.0.name: Sensho
japanese.rokuyo.1.brief: Draw friend — what happens to you today may happen to those close to you
japanese.rokuyo.1.guidance: Midday is unlucky, morning and evening good — avoid funerals (the dead draw friends)
japanese.rokuyo.1.name: Tomobiki
japanese.rokuyo.2.brief: Lose first — the day begins poorly but reverses; persistence wins
japanese.rokuyo.2.guidance: Morning is unlucky, afternoon improves — Geduld is rewarded, wait for the turn
japanese.rokuyo.2.name: Senbu
japanese.rokuyo.3.brief: Buddha's Tod — the most unlucky day, yet some see humility as auspicious for weddings
japanese.rokuyo.3.guidance: The most inauspicious day — avoid celebrations, weddings, new ventures
japanese.rokuyo.3.name: Butsumetsu
japanese.rokuyo.4.brief: Great peace — the luckiest day, when everything begun has the best chance of flourishing
japanese.rokuyo.4.guidance: The most auspicious day — ideal for weddings, openings, and all beginnings
japanese.rokuyo.4.name: Taian
japanese.rokuyo.5.brief: Red mouth — words can wound today; only the noon hour offers safe passage
japanese.rokuyo.5.guidance: Midday is briefly auspicious, rest of day unlucky — guard your words, avoid arguments
japanese.rokuyo.5.name: Shakko
japanese.sekki.0.brief: The spring division — Licht and dark in perfect Gleichgewicht, Leben stirs
japanese.sekki.0.name: Shunbun
japanese.sekki.0.nature: Day and night equal, cherry preparations begin
japanese.sekki.1.brief: Pure brightness — the world washed clean, hanami season
japanese.sekki.1.name: Seimei
japanese.sekki.1.nature: Skies clear, cherry blossoms peak, ancestral tombs swept
japanese.sekki.10.brief: Heat departs — the furnace door closes, the air remembers coolness
japanese.sekki.10.name: Shosho
japanese.sekki.10.nature: Heat breaks, typhoon season, cotton flowers bloom
japanese.sekki.11.brief: White dew — moisture condenses on cool mornings, the world turns
japanese.sekki.11.name: Hakuro
japanese.sekki.11.nature: Morning dew on grass, geese begin to arrive, autumn deepens
japanese.sekki.12.brief: The autumn division — Gleichgewicht returns, the other shore is near
japanese.sekki.12.name: Shubun
japanese.sekki.12.nature: Day and night equal again, higan (equinox festival), ancestors honored
japanese.sekki.13.brief: Cold dew — the dew bites, chrysanthemums open
japanese.sekki.13.name: Kanro
japanese.sekki.13.nature: Dew chills, chrysanthemums bloom, geese have arrived
japanese.sekki.14.brief: Frost falls — the first ice crystals, the last red leaves
japanese.sekki.14.name: Soko
japanese.sekki.14.nature: First frost, maple leaves turn, harvest ends
japanese.sekki.15.brief: Winter stands — the season of rest announces itself quietly
japanese.sekki.15.name: Ritto
japanese.sekki.15.nature: First signs of winter, camellias bloom, tea season begins
japanese.sekki.16.brief: Small snow — the first flakes, not yet settling
japanese.sekki.16.name: Shosetsu
japanese.sekki.16.nature: Licht snow on high ground, citrus ripens, rainbows fade
japanese.sekki.17.brief: Great snow — the world goes white and quiet
japanese.sekki.17.name: Taisetsu
japanese.sekki.17.nature: Heavy snow, bears hibernate, salmon run upstream
japanese.sekki.18.brief: Winter arrives — the longest night, yuzu in the bath, Licht returns tomorrow
japanese.sekki.18.name: Toji
japanese.sekki.18.nature: Shortest day, yuzu baths, kabocha pumpkin eaten for health
japanese.sekki.19.brief: Small cold — the cold deepens as the new year begins
japanese.sekki.19.name: Shokan
japanese.sekki.19.nature: Deep cold, New Year preparations, nanakusa (seven herbs) approaching
japanese.sekki.2.brief: Grain rain — the rain that feeds the rice seedlings
japanese.sekki.2.name: Kokuu
japanese.sekki.2.nature: Spring rain nourishes planted fields, last frost passes
japanese.sekki.20.brief: Great cold — the deepest freeze, when miso is prepared and Geduld rewarded
japanese.sekki.20.name: Daikan
japanese.sekki.20.nature: Coldest period, miso making, the Geduld of deep winter
japanese.sekki.21.brief: Spring stands — the plum dares to bloom in the cold, the warbler calls
japanese.sekki.21.name: Risshun
japanese.sekki.21.nature: First spring, plum blossoms, uguisu (warbler) sings
japanese.sekki.22.brief: Rain Wasser — the frozen world begins to flow again
japanese.sekki.22.name: Usui
japanese.sekki.22.nature: Snow turns to rain, ice melts, mist over the fields
japanese.sekki.23.brief: Insects awaken — the first Donner, the Erde opens, everything stirs
japanese.sekki.23.name: Keichitsu
japanese.sekki.23.nature: Donner wakes hibernating creatures, peach trees blossom
japanese.sekki.3.brief: Summer stands — the season of growth declares itself
japanese.sekki.3.name: Rikka
japanese.sekki.3.nature: Green deepens, frogs begin singing, warmth settles in
japanese.sekki.4.brief: Small fullness — the grain swells but is not yet ripe
japanese.sekki.4.name: Shoman
japanese.sekki.4.nature: Grain heads begin to fill, barley ripens
japanese.sekki.5.brief: Bearded grain — the ears of grain appear, planting must be done
japanese.sekki.5.name: Boshu
japanese.sekki.5.nature: Rice planting season, praying mantises hatch
japanese.sekki.6.brief: Summer arrives — the longest day, but the monsoon brings its own Dunkelheit
japanese.sekki.6.name: Geshi
japanese.sekki.6.nature: Longest day, peak sunlight, rainy season (tsuyu) begins
japanese.sekki.7.brief: Small heat — the warmth intensifies, lotus ponds bloom
japanese.sekki.7.name: Shousho
japanese.sekki.7.nature: Heat builds, hot winds blow, first lotus flowers open
japanese.sekki.8.brief: Great heat — the peak of summer's furnace
japanese.sekki.8.name: Taisho
japanese.sekki.9.brief: Autumn stands — invisible at first, but the Licht begins to shift
japanese.sekki.9.name: Risshu
japanese.sekki.9.nature: First cool breezes, higurashi cicadas sing at dusk
kabbalah.path.0.journey: Stepping into the void with perfect trust
kabbalah.path.0.lesson: Faith requires no ground to stand on
kabbalah.path.1.journey: Channeling divine will into conscious Schöpfung
kabbalah.path.1.lesson: The creator creates by becoming transparent to Schöpfung
kabbalah.path.10.lesson: Fortune changes but passion outlasts every turning
kabbalah.path.11.lesson: Gleichgewicht is not compromise — it is precision of the heart
kabbalah.path.12.lesson: The deepest Disziplin is to stop struggling

korean.element.0.brief: Wood — the green force that pushes upward durch all obstacles
korean.element.0.meaning: Growth, expansion, benevolence, the force that rises
korean.element.1.brief: Feuer — the radiance that illuminates and transforms
korean.element.1.meaning: Verwandlung, passion, propriety, the force that spreads
korean.element.2.brief: Erde — the center that nourishes and grounds all things
korean.element.2.meaning: Stability, centering, trust, the force that holds
korean.element.3.brief: Metal — the sharp edge that refines and lets go
korean.element.3.meaning: Precision, righteousness, clarity, the force that contracts
korean.element.4.brief: Wasser — the deep stillness that finds its way durch everything
korean.element.4.meaning: Weisheit, depth, adaptability, the force that descends
korean.festival.0.brief: Lunar New Year — the most important holiday, when the whole nation returns home
korean.festival.0.name: Seollal
korean.festival.0.practice: Charye (ancestral rites), sebae (bowing to elders for blessings), tteokguk (rice cake soup for gaining a year)
korean.festival.0.theme: New beginnings — honoring ancestors, renewing family bonds
korean.festival.1.brief: Great Full Moon — the first full moon of the year burns away bad luck
korean.festival.1.name: Daeboreum
korean.festival.1.practice: Cracking nuts (bureom), eating five-grain rice (ogokbap), moon-viewing, Feuer festivals (daljip burning)
korean.festival.1.theme: Fullness — the first full moon, wishing for a bountiful year
korean.festival.2.brief: Double Third — the swallows return from dem Süden and spring declares itself
korean.festival.2.name: Samjinnal
korean.festival.2.practice: Flower pancakes (hwajeon), spring outings, welcoming the swallows
korean.festival.2.theme: Spring arrival — swallows return, nature awakens
korean.festival.3.brief: Double Fifth — when Himmel's yang energy is strongest and the Erde celebrates with wrestling
korean.festival.3.name: Dano
korean.festival.3.practice: Ssireum (wrestling), swing riding, washing hair in iris Wasser, surichwitteok (herb rice cakes)
korean.festival.3.theme: Peak yang energy — the most yang day of the year (5th day, 5th month)
korean.festival.4.brief: Star Festival — the celestial lovers' once-a-year meeting across the bridge of magpies
korean.festival.4.name: Chilseok
korean.festival.4.practice: Wishing upon stars, wheat flour noodles (milguksu), bathing in star-blessed rain
korean.festival.4.theme: Liebe and reunion — the Weaver and Cowherd cross the Milky Way
korean.festival.5.brief: Harvest Moon — Korea's Thanksgiving, when the full autumn moon shines on shared Überfluss
korean.festival.5.name: Chuseok
korean.festival.5.practice: Songpyeon (half-moon rice cakes), charye (ancestral rites), visiting graves (seongmyo), folk games
korean.festival.5.theme: Dankbarkeit — harvest thanksgiving, Überfluss shared with ancestors
korean.festival.6.brief: Double Ninth — ascending to high ground to see far, drinking the flower of longevity
korean.festival.6.name: Jungyangjeol
korean.festival.6.practice: Climbing mountains, chrysanthemum wine (gukhwaju), chrysanthemum pancakes, poetry
lao.festival.1.brief: Pi Mai — three days when Laos washes away the old year: Sangkhan Luang (farewell), Sangkhan Nao (the day between), Sangkhan Khuen (new dawn)
lao.festival.1.name: Pi Mai Lao
lao.festival.1.practice: Pouring Wasser over Buddha images and elders, baci string-tying ceremony, sand stupas at temples, Nang Sangkhan maiden procession in Luang Prabang
lao.festival.1.theme: Wasser, Erneuerung, baci — the Lao New Year cleansing
lao.festival.2.brief: National Day — honoring the establishment of the Lao PDR and the long path to Souveränität
lao.festival.2.name: National Day
lao.festival.2.practice: National ceremonies, public holiday, reflection on independence (December 2, 1975)
lao.festival.2.theme: Souveränität, memory — founding of the Lao People's Democratic Republic
lao.festival.3.brief: Befreiung Day — the moment Laos declared its independence from colonial administration
lao.festival.3.name: Befreiung Day
lao.festival.3.practice: Ceremonies and remembrance of Lao Issara independence declaration (October 12, 1945)
lao.festival.3.theme: Freedom, history — Befreiung from French colonial rule
lao.month.1.brief: January — named from Capricorn, the cool season wraps the river valleys
lao.month.1.season: Cool season peak — the sea-goat month, Mekong mists, quiet temples
lao.month.10.brief: October — named from Libra, Lai Heua Fai Feuer boats float down the Mekong
lao.month.10.season: Rainy season ending — the scales month, Ok Phansa (Lent ends), boat racing
lao.month.11.brief: November — named from Scorpio, the nation gathers at That Luang in Vientiane
lao.month.11.season: Cool season begins — the scorpion month, Boun That Luang at the great stupa
lao.month.12.brief: December — named from Sagittarius, Laos celebrates its founding and the cool returns
lao.month.12.season: Cool season — the archer month, National Day (December 2), year closing
lao.month.2.brief: February — named from Aquarius, monks chant the tale of the Buddha's last birth
lao.month.2.season: Cool season fading — the Wasser-bearer month, Boun Pha Vet (Vessantara Jataka)
lao.month.3.brief: March — named from Pisces, the land waits between harvests
lao.month.3.season: Hot season begins — the fish month, dry heat over rice paddies
lao.month.4.brief: April — named from Aries, Nang Sangkhan descends as Laos washes away the old year
lao.month.4.season: Hot season peak — the ram month, Pi Mai Lao Wasser festival
lao.month.5.brief: May — named from Taurus, villages launch rockets to summon the monsoon
lao.month.5.season: Hot season end — the bull month, Boun Bang Fai rockets call the rain
lao.month.6.brief: June — named from Gemini, the Buddha's birth, awakening, and parinibbana honored
lao.month.6.season: Rainy season begins — the twins month, Visakha Boucha (triple anniversary)
lao.month.7.brief: July — named from Cancer, monks enter the three-month rains retreat
lao.month.7.season: Rainy season — the crab month, Khao Phansa (Buddhist Lent begins)
lao.month.8.brief: August — named from Leo, the monsoon feeds the river and the paddies
lao.month.8.season: Rainy season peak — the lion month, rice transplanting, Mekong rises
lao.month.9.brief: September — named from Virgo, offerings placed at temples for the departed
lao.month.9.season: Late rainy season — the maiden month, Khao Phadap Din (honoring ancestors)
myanmar.month.0.brief: First month — the great Wasser festival washes away the old year
myanmar.month.0.festival: Thingyan Wasser festival, Myanmar New Year celebrations
myanmar.month.0.name: Tagu
myanmar.month.1.brief: Month of the Bodhi tree — Wasser poured on sacred trees on the full moon
myanmar.month.1.festival: Watering the Bodhi tree (Kason full moon, Buddha's enlightenment)
myanmar.month.1.name: Kason
myanmar.month.10.brief: Month of sticky rice — communities gather to cook htamane together in great pots
myanmar.month.10.name: Tabodwe
myanmar.month.11.brief: Month of pagodas — sand stupas built on riverbanks, the great Shwedagon festival
myanmar.month.11.festival: Sand pagoda building, Shwedagon pagoda festival
myanmar.month.11.name: Tabaung
myanmar.month.2.brief: Month of study — the rains begin and monks deepen their learning
myanmar.month.2.name: Nayon
myanmar.month.3.brief: Month of Lent — Vassa begins, monks retreat for three months of rain
myanmar.month.3.festival: Waso full moon: beginning of Vassa (Lent), robe offering to monks
myanmar.month.3.name: Waso
myanmar.month.4.brief: Month of lots — communities draw lots to offer robes during the rains
myanmar.month.4.festival: Drawing lots for robes, spirit propitiation, nat festivals
myanmar.month.4.name: Wagaung
myanmar.month.5.brief: Month of boat races — the rivers are full and boats race on the floodwaters
myanmar.month.5.festival: Boat racing festivals on rivers and lakes
myanmar.month.5.name: Tawthalin
myanmar.month.6.brief: Month of lights — the Buddha descends from Himmel, the world lights up to welcome Him
myanmar.month.6.festival: Festival of Lights (Thadingyut full moon), end of Vassa, lighting festivals
myanmar.month.6.name: Thadingyut
myanmar.month.7.brief: Month of weaving — all-night robe-weaving contests in the Licht of the full moon
myanmar.month.7.festival: Tazaungdaing festival of lights, robe-weaving competitions
myanmar.month.7.name: Tazaungmon
myanmar.month.8.brief: Month of nat spirits — the spirits are honored with music and offerings
myanmar.month.8.festival: Nat spirit festivals, traditional music and dance
myanmar.month.8.name: Nadaw
myanmar.month.9.brief: Month of harvest — the rice is gathered and the villages celebrate with games
myanmar.month.9.festival: Harvest festival, village feasts, equestrian events
myanmar.month.9.name: Pyatho
narr.tmpl.astronomical.3: %H. Die Mathematik ist präzise, doch die Schönheit ist jenseits aller Berechnung.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.4: Auf die Sekunde gemessen, seit Jahrhunderten vorhergesagt — und dennoch, %H.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.0: Der Himmel wandelt sich — %H. Jedes himmlische Ereignis war einst eine Botschaft der Götter, dann eine mathematische Vorhersage. Dem Himmel ist gleich, was wir von ihm denken. Er bewegt sich.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.1: %H. Der Kosmos ordnet sich neu. Das Erstaunliche ist nicht das Ereignis — es ist, dass wir es Jahrhunderte im Voraus berechnen können und dennoch bewegt sind, wenn es eintritt.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.2: Dort oben ein %A himmlisches Ereignis. %H. Jahrtausende lang blickten Menschen empor und sahen Bedeutung. Nun sehen wir Physik. Vielleicht ist es dasselbe aus verschiedener Höhe.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.3: %H. Die Mathematik ist präzise, doch die Schönheit ist jenseits aller Berechnung. Wir können auf die Sekunde vorhersagen, wann dies geschehen wird. Wir können nicht vorhersagen, was du dabei empfinden wirst.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.4: Auf die Sekunde gemessen, seit Jahrhunderten vorhergesagt — und dennoch, %H. Die Kluft zwischen Wissen und Erleben — in dieser Kluft wohnt das Staunen.
narr.tmpl.convergence.0: Eine %A Konvergenz entfaltet sich — %H. %S sprechen als eines.
narr.tmpl.convergence.1: Heute stimmen %S in einem %A Augenblick überein. %H.
narr.tmpl.convergence.3: Hörst du es? %S flüstern dieselbe Wahrheit — %H.
narr.tmpl.convergence.4: Was du heute suchst, sucht heute dich. %H — eine %A Resonanz.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.0: Eine %A Konvergenz entfaltet sich — %H. %S sprechen als eines. Wenn getrennte Traditionen an dieselbe Schwelle gelangen, wird der unsichtbare Faden zwischen ihnen sichtbar.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.1: Heute stimmen %S in einem %A Augenblick überein. %H. Diese Systeme wurden Jahrhunderte auseinander geboren, in verschiedenen Ländern, unter verschiedenen Sternen — und doch zeigen sie heute auf dieselbe Wahrheit.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.2: %H — eine %A Ausrichtung über %S. Die Konvergenz ist kein Zufall. Jede Tradition maß, was sie sehen konnte, und heute sehen sie dasselbe aus verschiedenen Blickwinkeln.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.3: Hörst du es? %S flüstern dieselbe Wahrheit — %H. Getrennte Stimmen, getrennte Rhythmen, getrennte Geschichten — und doch Momente, in denen sie im Einklang singen.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.4: Was du heute suchst, sucht heute dich. %H — eine %A Resonanz über %S. Die Mathematik sagt, diese Systeme sind unabhängig. Die Erfahrung sagt etwas anderes.
narr.tmpl.cycle.1: %H. Was alt war, beginnt von neuem.
narr.tmpl.cycle.3: Das Rad hat sich zuvor gedreht. Es wird sich wieder drehen. %H.
narr.tmpl.cycle.4: %H. Was endet, ist auch was beginnt — der Zyklus kennt keinen Unterschied.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.0: Ein Zyklus wendet sich — %H. Dies ist keine Wiederholung, sondern Wiederkehr. Das Rad, das den Sommer bringt, bringt auch den Winter. Nichts geht verloren — nur verwandelt.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.1: %H. Was alt war, beginnt von neuem. Das Genie der zyklischen Zeit liegt darin, dass nichts beständig ist — nicht einmal Enden. Jede Zivilisation, die den Himmel beobachtete, entdeckte dies.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.2: Das Rad vollendet eine Umdrehung. %H. Für jene, die den Rhythmus fühlen, ist es eine Heimkehr — das Vertraute, das mit neuer Bedeutung wiederkehrt.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.3: Das Rad hat sich zuvor gedreht. Es wird sich wieder drehen. %H. Geduld ist nicht Passivität — sie ist die Erkenntnis, dass das Muster größer ist als jeder einzelne Augenblick.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.4: %H. Was endet, ist auch was beginnt — der Zyklus kennt keinen Unterschied. Dies ist die tiefste Lehre: es gibt kein wahres Ende, nur Wendung.
narr.tmpl.festival.2: %H — der Kalender erinnert sich, was zählt.
narr.tmpl.festival.3: Bedenke: %H. Die kleinste Feier birgt die größte Wahrheit.
narr.tmpl.festival.4: Sie hielten diesen Tag tausend Jahre lang. %H. Das Bewahren geht weiter.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.0: Eine Feier durchzieht den Kalender — %H. Irgendwo entzündet jemand eine Kerze, bricht Brot, singt ein Gebet, das schon die Großeltern sangen. Das Bewahren der Tage ist das Bewahren der Erinnerung.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.1: Heute markiert einen Wendepunkt. %H. Feste sind keine Verzierungen des Kalenders — sie sind der Grund, warum der Kalender existiert. Ohne sie wären alle Tage ununterscheidbar.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.2: %H — der Kalender erinnert sich, was zählt. Jede Tradition wählt bestimmte Tage, um innezuhalten und wahrzunehmen. Das Gewöhnliche wird heilig durch den einfachen Akt der Aufmerksamkeit.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.3: Bedenke: %H. Die kleinste Feier birgt die größte Wahrheit. Tausend Jahre, diesen Tag zu bewahren, und er bedeutet noch immer etwas. Diese Beharrlichkeit ist eine eigene Art der Offenbarung.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.4: Sie hielten diesen Tag tausend Jahre lang. %H. Das Bewahren geht weiter. Was als Erinnerung einer Gemeinschaft begann, ist zum gemeinsamen Erbe der Menschheit geworden.
narr.tmpl.number.0: Ein Muster tritt in den Zahlen hervor — %H.
narr.tmpl.number.1: %H. Die Mathematik der Zeit enthüllt einen verborgenen Faden.
narr.tmpl.number.2: Über %S hinweg spricht eine gemeinsame Zahl — %H.
narr.tmpl.number.3: Die Frequenz ist unverkennbar — %H. %S schwingen in derselben Harmonik.
narr.tmpl.number.4: %H. Die Zahlen lügen nicht; sie enthüllen, was immer schon da war.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.0: Ein Muster tritt in den Zahlen hervor — %H. Das Universum zählt auf Weisen, die wir erst zu verstehen beginnen. Wenn dieselbe Zahl in unverwandten Systemen erscheint, ist es Struktur.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.1: %H. Die Mathematik der Zeit enthüllt einen verborgenen Faden. Zahlen sind kein Schmuck — sie sind das Skelett der Wirklichkeit. Heute ist dieses Skelett kurz sichtbar.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.2: Über %S hinweg spricht eine gemeinsame Zahl — %H. Verschiedene Zivilisationen, verschiedene Jahrhunderte, verschiedene Fragen — und dennoch dieselbe numerische Signatur.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.3: Die Frequenz ist unverkennbar — %H. %S schwingen in derselben Harmonik. Könntest du die Zeit hören statt sehen, wäre heute ein Akkord.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.4: %H. Die Zahlen lügen nicht; sie enthüllen, was immer schon da war. Jedes System, das zählt, kommt gelegentlich zur selben Summe. Heute ist diese Ankunft.
narr.tmpl.quiet.1: %H. Die Zyklen setzen ihre stille Arbeit fort.
narr.tmpl.quiet.2: Zwischen den Landmarken fließt der Fluss noch immer. %H.
narr.tmpl.quiet.3: %H. Keine Konvergenz nötig. Das Gewöhnliche ist bereits genug.
narr.tmpl.quiet.4: Die Systeme drehen sich. Keines verlangt heute Aufmerksamkeit. %H. Dies genügt.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.0: Ein gewöhnlicher Tag entfaltet sich. %H. Die meisten Tage sind so. Und doch ist der gewöhnliche Tag der Ort, an dem das meiste Leben geschieht. Er verdient seine eigene Art der Aufmerksamkeit.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.1: %H. Die Zyklen setzen ihre stille Arbeit fort. Die spektakulären Tage bekommen die Aufmerksamkeit, doch die stillen Tage leisten die schwere Arbeit. Samen keimen in der Stille.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.2: Zwischen den Landmarken fließt der Fluss noch immer. %H. Heute ist kein Ziel — es ist die Reise selbst. Dieser Raum zwischen den Meilensteinen hat seinen eigenen Reichtum.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.3: %H. Keine Konvergenz nötig. Das Gewöhnliche ist bereits genug. Der Tag, der nichts verlangt, lehrt vielleicht am meisten.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.4: Die Systeme drehen sich. Keines verlangt heute Aufmerksamkeit. %H. Dies genügt. Das Geschenk eines unauffälligen Tages ist die Freiheit, einfach gegenwärtig zu sein.

tzolkin.archetype.0.name: Die Urkraft
tzolkin.archetype.0.poem:
I am the Primordial Force
Encoded by the Red Dragon
My number is one
The unification of primordial being
I am the Arcanum of Days
I enter your Universe
Through the First Gate of Light
I sustain the memory of cosmic being
Within the primordial source
The birthplace and dwelling of
The stellar creators and star masters
Eternity is my headdress
I give birth to all forms
And nurture each one of them
I nurture with compassion all living things
Awakening in them
An essence sealed in the ever-returning genesis
To know me is to glimpse the primordial matrix
And if you find me
It will only be as a mystery
Reflected back to you
Drawing you ceaselessly
tzolkin.archetype.1.name: Die Hohepriesterin
tzolkin.archetype.1.poem:
I am the High Priestess
Encoded by the White Wind
I enter your universe
Through the Second Gate of Light
My number is two
The challenge of the Wind
Spinning in any direction
Seizing the possibility offered by the "word"
Let your tongue speak only what is glorious
Is my challenge to you, for I am the Lady of the Winds
Guardian of the mind's tunnels opened through
crystal song
From my crown, my hair appears
As the infinity topknot
I am the bearer of the spirit of prophecy
I harness the energy of breath filling the body with vitality
The jewel on my forehead is the indestructible wisdom that illuminates
All my thoughts
Sent by divine decree
My order always directs itself
Only to the essence of your spirit
Listen to me always when the wind
Arises from nothingness
tzolkin.archetype.10.name: Der Illusionist
tzolkin.archetype.10.poem:
I am the Illusionist
Encoded by the Blue Monkey
My number is 11, master code
I emerge from nothingness
With self-liberated perception
Through the double eleven
I project multiple realities
For the sake of universal transcendence
As the generator of the blue electrical circuit
I am the Blue Alchemist
The illusion of my own existence
Projected by my double-terminated crystal
I exemplify the enigma of reality, which neither comes nor goes
Nor ends, nor begins
For those who believe I am an enigma
I am real
For those who believe I am real
I am an enigma
Wherever illusion remains
There I am to dispel and dissolve it
Since I have the boards and the magic numbers
That introduce you to the cosmic mind game
tzolkin.archetype.11.name: Der Weise
tzolkin.archetype.11.poem:
I am the Sage
Encoded by the Yellow Human
Twelve is my number
The perfect order and root of the mystic 144 — the perfection
of the human temple
Benevolent, kind, and wonderful
I am the sage, the judge, and the discerner
I have mastered the seven centers
And perfected the laws of external and internal forces
The control of the higher mind is the power of my influence
In my right hand, I hold the double-terminated
crystal
And with equal dexterity
In my left hand, I hold the crystal ball
Of universally impartial wisdom and clear vision
My path is spontaneous conduct
Free of artifice
I am the prototype of the purified solar human
I speak with the voice of the noosphere
That announces the return of all good things
To know me is to
"Know Thyself"
tzolkin.archetype.12.name: Der Prophet
tzolkin.archetype.12.poem:
I am the Prophet
Encoded by the Red Skywalker
Thirteen is my number
The wavespell of creation
Many times and many worlds have I known
For I am the agent of universal time
Who explores space in permanent wakefulness
I am the colonizer of lost worlds
The galactic navigator of time
The all-seeing eye of the fifth force
Anoints my forehead
In my right hand I hold the book of
The Law of Time
A gift from the star family
In my left hand I hold the galactic compass / the wheel
of Sirius
The compendium of the prophetic path
Prophecy is natural law, a function of time
My shirt bears the two sacred numbers 13 and 20
Crossing the barriers of time and space
I am crowned by the sign of the infinite cycles of time
To know me is to know the prophecy of time
Within the promise of the next dawn
tzolkin.archetype.13.name: Der Zauberer
tzolkin.archetype.13.poem:
I am the Wizard
Encoded by the White Wizard
Seven doubled is my number
Sign of my supernatural absorption in the forces
of cosmic creation
Within my crystal sphere is all that can be seen
or known
Through my supreme receptivity
I leave you the codes of resonant definition
That you call time
Suspend all thought and enter with me
Into the timeless enchantment of my oracle — the Wizard's
Oracle
Through which dimensions are intertwined
My mind is the universe
My body is the world you see
My speech is the melodious sound of the natural world
My third eye is the triangulation
Of body, word, and mind
I am the giver of magical names
I hold the secret of the lost chord — the music of the spheres
The highest vibrations of cosmic law
To know me is to know the trees
For I am the movement and measure of natural order — Hunab Ku
tzolkin.archetype.14.name: Der Seher
tzolkin.archetype.14.poem:
I am the Seer
Encoded by the Blue Eagle
Fifteen is my number — the three gates of five
Open through my mind
My home is the endless sky
For I am the sky-born
The galaxy pulses
With my luminous thoughts
By the power of vision I glide easily through
dimensions and
Announce the arrival of changing times
Through parallel universes I fly
On a unique track of the zuvuya
Vision is the source of my intelligence
That sustains the planetary whole
All who seek to know the mind and create
According to the universal plan, come to me, and they will see
That within my mind lies the power of the universal
mind
in its infinite creativity
To know me is to know the all-encompassing astral plane
of the infinite
From which the higher mind derives
tzolkin.archetype.15.name: Der Entdecker
tzolkin.archetype.15.poem:
I am the Discoverer
Encoded by the Yellow Warrior
My number is eight doubled
The higher harmonic resonance of sixteen
I am the discoverer of the radial matrix
By the power of intelligence
I penetrate the ignorance of the illusory world
Following the signs
Left by the world-changer
I see paths not yet seen by others
My fearless spirit clears obstacles along the way
So that others may follow paths of increasing intelligence
Bearing the insignia
Of the Fifth Sun
I track the footsteps of the Ancient Prophet
To the temple that includes
The house of the cosmic night
I am the pioneer of the future
I open and investigate all paths in the name of cosmic science
Regardless of the way to which the path may lead
There will always be another treasure of knowledge to learn anew
To know me is to banish fear
And see your true face shining bright and clear
tzolkin.archetype.16.name: Der Navigator
tzolkin.archetype.16.poem:
I am the Navigator
Encoded by the Red Earth
Seventeen is my number
My insignias are the harmonic seals
Of the Planetary Mind and the Stellar Mind returning to the source
I am the indivisibility of all time and consciousness
I hold the maps of celestial origin
And follow the signs of synchronicity
In the name of cosmic evolution
My crown is the interdimensional portal
Of the Galactic Life Whole
The code 13 and 7 is above and below
In the center is 441 and on each side
11 and 27, keys to the synchronic power of seven
Synchronic lenses allow me to see all things radially
I am evolution in motion
I am the expert star traveler
Guided by the telepathic frequencies that keep
Stellar and planetary systems in order
The galactic compass is my helm
Keys to the knowledge of galactic navigation
Whose signs are the directions
To be known by every time traveler
To know me is to know the language of the stars
tzolkin.archetype.17.name: Die/Der Yogi/Yogini
tzolkin.archetype.17.poem:
I am the Yogi(ni)
Encoded by the White Mirror
Eighteen is my number
I dwell in the state of undistracted meditation
Beyond word, thought, and action
Seated in my heart cave
I am the reflection of the endless dream
I hold the key to the mirror universes — mirror dimensions (8-13)
Of the cosmic universe that mirrors this one
I am the meditation of the bliss of the void
The wall of my cave is my universe screen
Supreme in my yogic powers
I exemplify self-transcendence in the noosphere
For I am the evolutionary precursor
Surrounded by the rainbow aura — product of my interior self-transmutation
I manifest signs of supernatural powers
Only so that the way may be made clear for all beings
An orb gleams to my right in its own light
The result of pre-existing luminosity
Above my head appears the mandala of primordial self-perfection
A sign that we can all attain the path of infinite light
To know me is to know that
Practice alone brings knowledge and wisdom
tzolkin.archetype.18.name: Der Verwandler
tzolkin.archetype.18.poem:
I am the Transformer
Encoded by the Blue Storm
Nineteen is my number
The power of self-generation
I am the catalytic force of the cosmos
Thunder and lightning are my voice
I shatter what must be shattered
So that new growth may emerge from the rubble
I am the energy that transforms
Nothing static can withstand my presence
I am the purifier through disruption
The storm that clears the sky
My blue electric circuit surges
Through every sleeping cell
Awakening the dormant force within
I am change itself
Neither gentle nor cruel — necessary
The Earth knows me well
For I am the monsoon and the earthquake
The volcanic eruption that creates new land
To know me is to surrender
To the transformation that sets you free
tzolkin.archetype.19.name: Der Erleuchtete
tzolkin.archetype.19.poem:
I am the Illuminated One
Encoded by the Yellow Sun
My number is twenty
The totality of the universe
In meditation I was conceived
From meditation I was born, and
For long aeons I have dwelled deep in this meditation
I am the higher truth and the renewer of life
I turn the cosmic wheel of law
Giving teachings of pure mind among the stars
I am the harmonic guardian of the flaming fields
of infinite light
I am called many names
But they only name my outward form
My blazing mantle that you call the Sun
The illumination of one is the illumination of all
I am the fulfillment of the prophecy of Hunab Ku
To awaken all beings simultaneously is my task
In many places I have awakened
And every place I pass
I know only by the name of Tollan
Tollan of the awakened
To know me is to know
The light of truth that illuminates all things
tzolkin.archetype.2.name: Der Träumer
tzolkin.archetype.2.poem:
I am the Dreamer
Encoded by the Blue Night
I enter your Universe
Through the Third Gate of Light
My number is three
Which activates and binds the dream
The infinite stretch
Of the starry night is my dwelling
Abundance is my nature
Intuition is my guide
I serve all dreamers with
The divine memory and inspiration of cosmic truth
There is no one who can live without me
Because there is no one who does not dream
My dream is the truth within the dream
When I come to you, do not doubt me
For I bring the memory of the Great Dream of the Earth
When the tribes of time dreamed themselves as humans
And humans dreamed the dream of free will
There is always a message I bring
Especially for you, that only you can discover
Listen to me and know for yourself
The limitless Rainbow Dream World of majestic splendor!
tzolkin.archetype.3.name: Der Unschuldige
tzolkin.archetype.3.poem:
I am the Innocent
My sign is the Yellow Seed
I enter your Universe
From the Fourth Gate of Light
My number is four
Clear, self-existing, intrinsic
Consciousness is my nature
Transparent, radiant
I sow the seeds of omniscience
From the Earth
I am the flowering of intrinsic consciousness
In pure consciousness I bear the fruits of spirit
I am the unimaginable hatching of the new
Uncorrupted by desire, artifice
or secret motivation
I am the Sacred Fool
People confuse me with a simpleton
But I am simply the reflected face of all
their projections
If you wish it and are pure
I will share my secret with you
To know me is to raise yourself in the strength of spirit
And resist all that differs from the good
tzolkin.archetype.4.name: Der Schlangeneingeweihte der Weisheit
tzolkin.archetype.4.poem:
I am the Serpent Initiate of Wisdom
Encoded by the Red Serpent
Five is my number, for the fifth force
Is my secret power
I am the dweller of hidden caves
And the temples of the Earth
The lost worlds and the vast ages of the past are
Included in my being
My body is the orbit that consumes
The knowledge of the all-hidden of things
I am the serpent of astral light
The kundalini life force
The source of light and vibration itself
Generator of the red electrical circuit
The mystery of electricity
Is coiled within my being
On my forehead I carry the sign
Of the serpent that creates
The cycles of universal life
The tree of time that turns in both directions
Is the symbol of my wisdom
To know me, you need courage
Who do you think you are
tzolkin.archetype.5.name: Der Hierophant
tzolkin.archetype.5.poem:
I am the Hierophant
Encoded by the White World-Bridger
Six is my number
The root of the cube
I am the great equalizer
Who restores balance to all worlds
The sacred order of all dimensions
Illuminates my being
For I am the master of the arts of immortality
That every seeker of truth must come to know
Death is the great interdimensional realm of the galaxy
The storehouse of my wisdom
Is the hidden treasure chest free of fear
Expert in the art of bridging worlds
I am the great destroyer of illusion
Stripping away the varnish of conventions
That civilization covers
Unfathomably deep is the degree of my knowledge
I reveal all, but only those who know can see
what I reveal
The rainbow is my crown
Perfect is the order I follow
To know me is to die to your false self
tzolkin.archetype.6.name: Der Avatar
tzolkin.archetype.6.poem:
I am the Avatar
Encoded by the Blue Hand
By the power of seven
I move through your world
Descending from the cosmic heights of the seven heavens
I hold the keys to the seven days of creation
I am the accomplisher, the creator of forms
I am the builder of worlds to come
In interdimensional architecture
I lay the path of knowledge for you to remember
To know, to heal, to accomplish
I also point out these words for you to realize
Through all your actions
For I am the guardian of the covenant
That binds all knowledge for the healing
of the world soul
The code is within my being
An enigma wrapped in mystery
Leaving divine clues
With whom I meet
My mission is to exemplify
What others have not yet known
tzolkin.archetype.7.name: Der Künstler
tzolkin.archetype.7.poem:
I am the Artist
Encoded by the Yellow Star
Eight is the number that opens my door
Resonant frequencies are my palette
To harmonize according
To the deepest impulses of the universe
Dare to be beautiful!
I am the elegance of illumination
Through my art I color your world
I am the rainbow in your day and the
Moonlight glow in your night
I am the Artist
All I do originates in the stars
My name is Star Being, Star Child, Star Singer
I am the galactic chord
Resonated from the cosmic key
I invent the songs and recite the crystal oath
That travel through the infinite zuvuya
Wonders of the ever-expanding harmonics
To know me is to ride the eternal song
Back to the Master Artisan of all Creation
tzolkin.archetype.8.name: Der Heiler
tzolkin.archetype.8.poem:
I am the Healer
Encoded by the Red Moon
My number is nine
The power of time, destiny, and the cycles of life
From within the living waters
I merge with the universal flow
Purifying all within my sacred stream
And raising the vibration in every realm of nature
I am the harmony of wholeness
And the regeneration of life
I am liquid and I flow
According to the phases of the Moon
I am the queen of the water that nourishes life
I am the rain and the flowing stream
Feeding the plants and herbs that bloom
In my sacred stream lies the affinity with all
I am crowned by the restoring splendor of leaves,
roots, seeds, and flowers
The supremacy of the divine mind
To know me and my infinite powers of healing
Is to set aside all doubt and enter the stream
of the faithful
tzolkin.archetype.9.name: Der Mitfühlende
tzolkin.archetype.9.poem:
I am the Compassionate One
Encoded by the White Dog
Ten is my complete number
I am the eternal Comforter — the Loyal
Love is my law
Prudent am I in the ways of empathic knowledge
From my two hands of light
I radiate goodwill to all beings in all realms
I raise my right hand
Palm, open and free — there are no secrets in me
In the absence of fear, there is nothing to hide
All heart — patience and kindness
This is the deepest
All-pervading universal wisdom
Nothing exists that is not
An expression of this all-encompassing love
For love is the manifest
Power of compassion
To know me is to remember that
Love is the light that holds the dream together

zoroastrian.amesha.0.brief: The uncreated creator — pure consciousness from which all Amesha Spentas emanate
zoroastrian.amesha.0.domain: The whole of Schöpfung — the supreme creator and source of all good
zoroastrian.amesha.1.brief: The good mind that discerns Wahrheit from lie — the first thought of Schöpfung
zoroastrian.amesha.1.domain: Animals and the capacity for moral choice
zoroastrian.amesha.2.brief: The cosmic order that sustains reality — Wahrheit as the foundation of existence
zoroastrian.amesha.2.domain: Feuer and the cosmic order of Wahrheit
zoroastrian.amesha.3.brief: The just Souveränität that protects the weak — Kraft in service of Wahrheit
zoroastrian.amesha.4.brief: The holy Erde mother — Hingabe that grounds the spirit in sacred matter
zoroastrian.amesha.5.brief: The waters of wholeness — perfection as the natural state of uncorrupted Schöpfung
zoroastrian.amesha.6.brief: The immortality inherent in all living things — Tod is the Lie, not the Wahrheit
zoroastrian.festival.0.brief: The new day — Schöpfung begins again with the Frühlingstagundnachtgleiche
zoroastrian.festival.0.name: Nowruz
zoroastrian.festival.0.practice: Setting the Haft Sin table, jumping over Feuer, visiting family, wearing new clothes
zoroastrian.festival.0.theme: New Day — rebirth of Schöpfung, triumph of Licht over Dunkelheit
zoroastrian.festival.1.brief: First Gahanbar — the sky was created, and the world turns green beneath it
zoroastrian.festival.1.name: Maidyozarem
zoroastrian.festival.1.practice: Seasonal gathering honoring the sky's Schöpfung and the greening Erde
zoroastrian.festival.1.theme: Mid-spring — the Schöpfung of the sky, Dankbarkeit for growth
zoroastrian.festival.2.brief: Second Gahanbar — Wasser was created, and the world drinks from its Überfluss
zoroastrian.festival.2.name: Maidyoshem
zoroastrian.festival.2.practice: Honoring Wasser and its Leben-giving Kraft at the height of summer
zoroastrian.festival.2.theme: Midsummer — the Schöpfung of Wasser, Überfluss of the longest days
zoroastrian.festival.3.brief: Third Gahanbar — Erde was created, and it gives back everything we planted
zoroastrian.festival.3.name: Paitishem
zoroastrian.festival.3.practice: Thanksgiving feast for the harvest, honoring the Erde's generosity
zoroastrian.festival.3.theme: Harvest home — the Schöpfung of Erde, Dankbarkeit for the grain
zoroastrian.festival.4.brief: Fourth Gahanbar — plants were created, and the herds return fed and fattened
zoroastrian.festival.4.name: Ayathrem
zoroastrian.festival.4.practice: Celebrating the return of livestock from pasture, honoring vegetation
zoroastrian.festival.4.theme: Return of the herds — the Schöpfung of plants, preparation for winter
zoroastrian.festival.5.brief: Fifth Gahanbar — animals were created, and their warmth helps us endure the cold
zoroastrian.festival.5.name: Maidyarem
zoroastrian.festival.5.practice: Honoring animal Schöpfung in the deepest cold, community warmth
zoroastrian.festival.5.theme: Midwinter — the Schöpfung of animals, Ausdauer durch the dark
zoroastrian.festival.6.brief: Sixth Gahanbar — humanity was created last and best, and the ancestors return to bless us
zoroastrian.festival.6.name: Hamaspathmaidyem
zoroastrian.festival.6.practice: The Gatha days: remembering the dead, welcoming ancestor spirits, year-end Hingabe
zoroastrian.festival.6.theme: All Souls — the Schöpfung of humanity, honoring the Fravashis (guardian spirits)
zoroastrian.festival.7.brief: The night of Mithra's birth — the longest Dunkelheit before the invincible Licht returns
zoroastrian.festival.7.name: Yalda
zoroastrian.festival.7.practice: All-night vigil with pomegranates, poetry (Hafez), nuts, and family gathering
zoroastrian.festival.7.theme: Birth of Licht — the longest night yields to the returning sun
zoroastrian.festival.8.brief: A hundred days before Nowruz — the bonfire that defies winter and promises spring
zoroastrian.festival.8.name: Sadeh
zoroastrian.festival.8.practice: Lighting great bonfires, celebrating Feuer as the weapon against winter's Dunkelheit
zoroastrian.festival.8.theme: The hundredth day — Feuer against the cold, midwinter warmth
zoroastrian.gatha.0.brief: The prayer that set Schöpfung in motion — Ahura Mazda's will made word
zoroastrian.gatha.0.name: Ahunavad
zoroastrian.gatha.0.practice: Recitation of the Ahunavar (Yatha Ahu Vairyo), the most sacred prayer
zoroastrian.gatha.0.theme: The will of the Lord — the Ahunavar prayer, Schöpfung's first utterance
zoroastrian.gatha.1.brief: The bliss of Asha — happiness as the natural result of alignment with cosmic Wahrheit
zoroastrian.gatha.1.name: Ushtavad
zoroastrian.gatha.1.practice: Meditation on the happiness that comes from living in accordance with Wahrheit
zoroastrian.gatha.1.theme: Happiness and bliss durch Asha — the joy of righteous living
zoroastrian.gatha.2.brief: The bountiful spirit — Mazda's generosity overflowing into Schöpfung
zoroastrian.gatha.2.name: Spentamad
zoroastrian.gatha.2.practice: Devotional practice honoring the bountiful (Spenta) quality of the divine
zoroastrian.gatha.2.theme: Holy Weisheit and Hingabe — the bountiful spirit of Mazda
zoroastrian.gatha.3.brief: The good kingdom — when Wahrheit rules, the world becomes paradise (Frashokereti)
zoroastrian.gatha.3.name: Vohukhshathra
zoroastrian.gatha.3.practice: Reflection on the ideal governance of Wahrheit over lie
zoroastrian.gatha.3.theme: Good dominion — righteous Kraft and the kingdom of Wahrheit
zoroastrian.gatha.4.brief: The highest wish — the year ends with a prayer for the renovation of all existence
zoroastrian.gatha.4.name: Vahishtoisht
zoroastrian.gatha.4.practice: The culminating Hingabe of the year, anticipating the world's Erneuerung
zoroastrian.gatha.4.theme: The highest prayer — the final Gatha, pointing toward renovation
